evals.prompt: Configure Workbox caching for a Next.js PWA with API routes at /api/*, static assets, and user-uploaded images at images.cdn.com.
evals.expected_output: Workbox config with appropriate strategies per URL pattern

assertions.text: Output uses NetworkFirst for API routes
Output uses CacheFirst or StaleWhileRevalidate for images
Output uses precache/CacheFirst for static assets
Output sets maxEntries or maxAgeSeconds on all caches
Output does NOT cache POST/PUT/DELETE API calls with a caching strategy

evals.prompt: Build the useInstallPrompt hook for a React PWA that captures the beforeinstallprompt event, shows a custom install button, and tracks installs in analytics.
evals.expected_output: React hook with proper event lifecycle and analytics tracking

assertions.text: Output adds beforeinstallprompt event listener
Output calls e.preventDefault() to capture the event
Output calls prompt.prompt() on user action
Output reads prompt.userChoice outcome
Output includes cleanup in useEffect return
Output tracks the install outcome in analytics

evals.prompt: Diagnose why a PWA is not showing the install prompt on mobile Chrome. The manifest exists and HTTPS is configured.
evals.expected_output: Checklist of install criteria with diagnostic steps

assertions.text: Output checks for service worker with fetch handler
Output checks manifest for required icons (192px and 512px)
Output checks manifest display is not 'browser'
Output mentions that the app may already be installed
Output provides DevTools debugging steps

evals.prompt: Implement Web Push notifications for a PWA: client subscription, server-side sending with web-push, and service worker push handler.
evals.expected_output: Complete push implementation: client + server + service worker

assertions.text: Output uses PushManager.subscribe with userVisibleOnly: true
Output uses applicationServerKey from VAPID public key
Output sends subscription to server via POST
Output uses web-push library on server with sendNotification
Output implements push event listener in service worker
Output implements notificationclick handler
Output does NOT request push permission on page load

evals.prompt: Implement Background Sync for a PWA that needs to submit forms when offline. Use Workbox BackgroundSyncPlugin.
evals.expected_output: Workbox Background Sync configuration for POST requests

assertions.text: Output uses BackgroundSyncPlugin from workbox-background-sync
Output registers the plugin on POST requests to API
Output uses NetworkOnly strategy (not caching mutations)
Output sets maxRetentionTime in plugin options
Output explains that sync replays when the user comes back online
